name: vente-en-ligne
author: John
description: Application de gestion des ventes en ligne

scripts.lint: eslint --ignore-pattern .next/** --ignore-pattern build/** --ignore-pattern dist-electron-v12/** --ignore-pattern dist-electron-v14/** --ignore-pattern dist-electron-v15/** --ignore-pattern dist-electron-v16/** --ignore-pattern dist-electron-v22/** --ignore-pattern dist-electron-v23/** --ignore-pattern c/**
scripts.electron:build: next build && npm run electron:rebuild-native && node scripts/prepare-electron.js && cross-env npm_config_loglevel=silent npm_config_progress=false electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build-only: npm run electron:rebuild-native && node scripts/prepare-electron.js && cross-env npm_config_loglevel=silent npm_config_progress=false electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:signed: node -e "if (!process.env.CSC_LINK) { console.error('CSC_LINK manquant'); process.exit(1); } if (!process.env.CSC_KEY_PASSWORD) { console.error('CSC_KEY_PASSWORD manquant'); process.exit(1); }" && next build && npm run electron:rebuild-native && node scripts/prepare-electron.js && cross-env npm_config_loglevel=silent npm_config_progress=false electron-builder --win --config.forceCodeSigning=true
scripts.electron:build:signed-only: node -e "if (!process.env.CSC_LINK) { console.error('CSC_LINK manquant'); process.exit(1); } if (!process.env.CSC_KEY_PASSWORD) { console.error('CSC_KEY_PASSWORD manquant'); process.exit(1); }" && npm run electron:rebuild-native && node scripts/prepare-electron.js && cross-env npm_config_loglevel=silent npm_config_progress=false electron-builder --win --config.forceCodeSigning=true
